name: Player Character
description: A unique, player-controlled character with a full range of abilities.

name: Minion
description: A standard, non-unique character. Typically found in groups and defeated easily.

name: Captain
description: A more durable character that often leads minions. A moderate threat.

name: Vanguard
description: A powerful and resilient character, a significant threat on the battlefield.

name: Boss
description: A major antagonist with a large health pool and unique, dangerous abilities.

name: Vehicle / Structure Captain
description: An object, vehicle, or structure with the durability of a Captain-level character.

name: Vehicle / Structure Vanguard
description: An object, vehicle, or structure with the durability of a Vanguard-level character.

name: Vehicle / Structure Boss
description: An object, vehicle, or structure with the durability of a Boss-level character.
